meta.title: Public trust view - Practitioner
meta.description: Review how your public rating and published feedback currently appear to patients.

list.title: Your public reviews view
list.note: This page is read-only. It shows how your public trust profile appears now based on published patient feedback.

reviews.heading: Published review snippets
reviews.note: Only moderation-safe, publicly visible review snippets are shown.
reviews.noText: No written text in this published review.

profileError.heading: Your practitioner profile is not available right now
profileError.note: We could not load your practitioner profile.

error.heading: Public reviews view is not available right now
error.note: We could not load your public trust data.

empty.heading: No published reviews yet
empty.note: Public review snippets will appear here after eligible session feedback is published.

notPublicYet.heading: Your profile is not publicly visible yet
notPublicYet.note: This view needs your public practitioner profile to be visible before public trust data can be shown.

items.noReplies: Practitioner replies are not available in this baseline.
items.noModeration: Moderation actions are not available on this page.
